qids.subject: Programming in C
qids.prose: What is the output printed by the following C code? # include <stdio.h> int main () { char a [6] = "world"; int i, j; for (i = 0, j = 5; i < j; a [i++] = a [j--]); printf ("%s\n", a); } A. dlrow B. Null string C. dlrld D. worow D.

qids.subject: Programming in C
qids.prose: Consider the C program given below. What does it print? #include <stdio.h> int main () { int i, j; int a [8] = {1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8}; for(i = 0; i < 3; i++) { a[i] = a[i] + 1; i++; } i--;
